title: T-Cut Colour Fast Sliver Car Wax Polish Scratch Remover Colour Enhancer - 150g * 6 Colours Available
description: From the manufacturer How to use: Apply T-Cut Color Fast Scratch Remover sparingly onto a microfibre cloth. Work the product into the affected area in a circular motion until the scratch is removed. Once the product has been suitably worked, use a second clean cloth to wipe away any residue.
